title: Frosted on Isles
description: A Crimson Isles overlay from the textures of the pack "Frosted on Ice"
body:
### Frosted on Isles is a Crimson Isles overlay from the blocks of the pack "Frosted on Ice" Featuring:

❄️ Fresh icy blocks for all crimson isle blocks.

🧩 CTM glass textures.

💙 Custom nether-fog color.

### **This pack is best experienced with:**
### 
**Complementary shaders (Unbound style) on medium profile (upping contrast and brightness helps also REMOVE FULLBRIGHT!!!)**
- OptiFine 1.8.9 (Not needed for the 1.21 version) 
- Neu (for 1.8.9) / Frimament (for 1.21)
- Connected Textures enabled
- Custom Colors and Skybox enabled (optional but supported)

  
**If you want to use/change this pack and distribute it to anyone contact me via discord**
